checks.name: miniapp-3001-classification
checks.detail: Mini App now distinguishes supported HappyTG reuse from foreign listeners and names the foreign HTTP listener on port 3001.

checks.name: api-4000-reuse
checks.detail: API again treats an already-running HappyTG API on port 4000 as supported reuse instead of a raw EADDRINUSE failure.

checks.name: bootstrap-preflight-truthfulness
checks.detail: Bootstrap setup classifies Mini App 3001 as conflict and API 4000 as legitimate reuse, with explicit override guidance and no hidden port reassignment.

checks.name: port-fallback-guidance
checks.detail: Bootstrap planned-port resolution now honors PORT as fallback after service-specific app port env keys.

checks.name: proof-bundle-synchronized
checks.detail: Evidence, problems, verdict, and task metadata are synchronized with the fresh verifier result, and task validate reports the bundle as complete/passed.
